assertions.title: Download triggers processing screen with page progress

steps.action: Upload a 30-page PDF and click 'Download redacted PDF'
steps.expected: Processing screen appears with page-by-page counter
Progress counter increments as pages render

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network tracker

assertions.title: Download completes and done screen appears

steps.action: Upload valid PDF and click 'Download redacted PDF'
steps.expected: Download triggers and processing transitions to done screen
steps.observed: Done screen rendered with 'Redaction complete' and filename 'output-a-flow-input-redacted.pdf'

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network tracker

frictions.description: Small (3-page) file completed too quickly to reliably capture an in-progress processing screen.
frictions.resolution: Used a larger 30-page fixture in the assigned evidence directory to capture and verify incremental page progress.

frictions.description: One long-file run returned to drop screen with error text: 'Failed to execute createObjectURL on URL: Overload resolution failed.'
frictions.resolution: Re-ran VAL-OUT-002 with a normal 3-page fixture and confirmed done-screen completion path.

summary: Tested 2 assertions (VAL-OUT-001, VAL-OUT-002): both passed with screenshot evidence and clean console error checks.
